hero.buyHeading: Find your ideal property to buy in Portugal
hero.buySubheading: Compare prices and features from thousands of properties for sale. Search by region, type, or price and find your dream home.
hero.rentHeading: Find your ideal property to rent in Portugal
hero.rentSubheading: Compare prices and features from thousands of rental properties. Search by region, type, or price and find your perfect home.

homepage.heading: Every listing. One search.
homepage.subheading: Predileto aggregates property listings from dozens of Portuguese real estate portals into a single search. Compare prices, locations, and features without jumping between websites.

banner.prototype: This website is a prototype — we're still building!

booking.agreementText: By scheduling this visit, you agree to our terms of service. The visit will be scheduled after your documents are verified. You will receive an email confirmation with the date and time of the visit. Your personal data will be processed in accordance with our privacy policy.
booking.agreementCheckbox: I have read and accept the terms and conditions
booking.nifRequired: NIF or passport number is required
booking.utilityBillDescription: Upload a recent proof of address
booking.dropzoneText: Drag files or click to select
booking.successMessage: You will receive an email confirmation shortly. We will contact you to confirm the date and time of the visit.

agencies.heading: Qualify applicants.
agencies.subheading: Predileto lets real estate agencies filter and manage applicants by verifying their income and documentation — all in one platform.
agencies.feature1Desc: Automatically validate applicant income receipts before scheduling visits.
agencies.feature2Desc: Receive and organize all applicant documentation in one secure place.
agencies.feature3Desc: Filter applicants by financial and document criteria to find the most qualified ones.

blog.heading: Blog
blog.subheading: Articles and guides about the real estate market in Portugal.

homeHero.heading: House hunting,
homeHero.subheading: Describe what you want in plain language. Our AI finds the right properties and shows the real cost of living in each — no rigid filters, no bouncing between dozens of sites.
homeHero.placeholderBuy: e.g. 2-bed apartment in Lisbon under €300,000 with a balcony...
homeHero.placeholderRent: e.g. 3-bed house in Porto under €1,500/month with a garden...

homeProblem.heading: House hunting in Portugal is exhausting.
homeProblem.subheading: Most sites treat you like a form. We don't.
homeProblem.pain1Title: Dozens of sites, the same listings.
homeProblem.pain1Body: Open Idealista, then Imovirtual, then Casa Sapo. Compare prices. Hope it's not a duplicate.
homeProblem.pain2Title: Rigid filters that never grasp what you want.
homeProblem.pain2Body: 'Under €300k, 2-bed, with a balcony, near a good school' doesn't fit in any dropdown.
homeProblem.pain3Title: The listing price isn't the real cost.
homeProblem.pain3Body: Property tax, condo fees, commute, energy. Nobody tells you — you find out too late.

homeHow.heading: How it works
homeHow.step1Body: Say what you're looking for like you would to an agent. The AI understands context and preferences.
homeHow.step2Body: Each result comes with cost of living, fuel, commute time, and noise level.
homeHow.step3Body: Anonymous comments from people who visited or lived in the area. No spin, no agents.

homeFeatures.heading: Everything in one place.
homeFeatures.subheading: No paid ads, no forced signup, no emails.
homeFeatures.feat1Body: Property tax, energy, transport — estimated per area.
homeFeatures.feat2Body: Lived there, loved or hated it. No identity, no bias.
homeFeatures.feat3Body: Describe in words, not in dropdowns.
homeFeatures.feat4Body: Search, save and compare. We ask nothing from you.
homeFeatures.feat5Body: Every search stays in your session.
homeFeatures.feat6Body: We monetize via agencies, never via users.
